allow: PowerShell($py = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($py\) { python --version; pip --version } else { "python NOT found" }; \(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source)
PowerShell(py -m pip install --quiet --disable-pip-version-check vnstock pandas openpyxl 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 15; "EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell($env:PYTHONUTF8='1'; $env:PYTHONIOENCODING='utf-8'; py -c "from vnstock import Vnstock; s=Vnstock\(\).stock\(symbol='HPG', source='VCI'\); df=s.quote.history\(start='2021-01-01', end='2026-06-09', interval='1D'\); print\(df.columns.tolist\(\)\); print\(df.tail\(3\).to_string\(\)\); print\('ROWS', len\(df\)\)")
PowerShell($o = & "E:\\Automation\\kw.bat" VCB ACB MWG HPG VIC VHM 2>&1; $o | Where-Object { $_ -match "Định giá|So ngành|Vốn hóa|CỔ PHIẾU|Đã xuất" })
Bash(py -c "import json; json.load\(open\('data/brief_today.json', encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('OK valid JSON'\)")
